creator: duncan@bayne.id.au
text:
Hi,

First up, thanks for the signal-desktop port ♥  It's been a major factor in my returning to FreeBSD as a daily driver.

However, signal-desktop now won't link to my phone.  I follow the normal linking process, then receive the following message:

"Something went wrong!

Update Signal on this device to link your phone."

In the console I see:

{"level":40,"time":"2024-10-05T04:53:48.556Z","msg":"MainSQL: Database log code=17: statement aborts at 13: [\n      SELECT *\n      FROM items\n      WHERE id = $id;] database schema has changed"}
{"level":40,"time":"2024-10-05T04:53:48.556Z","msg":"MainSQL: Database log code=17: statement aborts at 11: [SELECT * FROM senderKeys] database schema has changed"}

I've installed signal via pkg.  

Versions of things:

* FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE-p4
* Signal 7.13.0 

I'm very happy to help with testing debug builds etc. if that would help.
